title: ProductChooserSection
description: Post-purchase product identification grid ('Which DOTDAY fabric do you have?'): eyebrow + heading + lead (supports [label](href) inline links) over centered roll cards, each with a square product photo, neon tag, title, body, and a text link to its product page. Semantically distinct from groundConditionCards (pre-purchase condition -> fabric). This file is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the section's shape - the TS type is generated from it (ProductChooser.types.ts) and the landing-page doc schema $refs it.

eyebrow.description: Neon-outline pill above the heading, e.g. 'Know your roll'.

lead.description: Intro copy. Inline links use [label](href) and render as neon-underline inlinks.
